Cabal, like Git, has a command hook mechanism. Any `cabal-command` executable
becomes available as `cabal command`. There are three such hooks available;

`dpack`
: is `dhall-hpack-cabal`, but for any `package.dhall` in the source tree.

- `ypack` is `hpack`, but for any `package.yaml` in the source tree.
- `diy-pack` converts any `package.dhall` into `package.yaml` in the source tree.

## `dpack`

## `ypack`

## `diy-pack`
